Lakecia Gunter · Variant 11

A rare blend of technical command and executive elegance.

Lakecia’s biography is not decorative credibility. It is the foundation for how she sees systems, influence, and risk.

Bring this caliber into your corner.

The record

Lakecia Gunter is a former CTO at Microsoft, former Chief of Staff to the CEO at Intel, and a former Digital Logic Designer for the U.S. Department of Defense. She has spent 25 years building and leading in technology.

The boardroom

As an Independent Director at IDEX Corporation, a NYSE-listed company, Lakecia understands how innovation must meet governance, capital allocation, and accountability.

The movement

As host of the ROAR podcast and Co-Founding Advisor to TechArena.ai, she champions women leaders who are ready to own the future of AI, not merely adapt to it.

Top 50

Black Business Women in the U.S.

$1B+

Platforms shaped.

25 yrs

In technology leadership.

Dark, elegant, unapologetically executive.

Bring this caliber into your corner.

Power / Precision / Presence · hello@lakeciagunter.com
